mapper.select: SELECT id, role_type, name, template, status, create_time, update_time FROM prompt_template WHERE role_type = #{roleType} AND status = 1 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, role_type, name, template, status, create_time, update_time FROM prompt_template ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO prompt_template (role_type, name, template, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{roleType}, #{name}, #{template}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE prompt_template SET role_type = #{roleType}, name = #{name}, template = #{template}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
